providers.name: Dr. Sadhana A. Shah
providers.title: Physician / Practice Lead

education.medical_school: Topiwala National Medical College, University of Bombay, India

board_certifications: American College of Specialist in Geriatrics
fellowships: Fellow, American College of Ethical Physician
Fellow, American College of Specialist in Geriatrics
Diplomat, American Board of Geriatric Medicine
providers.bio: Dr. Sadhana Shah has been practicing medicine since 1992 and is one of the top physicians in the Tampa Bay area offering overall wellness programs. With 20+ years of managed care experience, she provides comprehensive care for patients with diabetes, hypertension, coronary artery disease, renal disease, endocrine disorders, and more. She is board certified by the American Board of Internal Medicine, the American Board of Geriatric Medicine, and the American College of Specialist in Geriatrics.
providers.patient_quote: Dr Shah is great, easy getting an appt, really understanding and was great discussing a treatment plan.

providers.name: Dr. Varun Bhaskar
providers.title: Pulmonologist

education.medical_school: Guru Nanak Dev University / Medical College

providers.bio: Dr. Varun Bhaskar is a pulmonologist with over 40 years of experience in the medical field. He has extensive experience treating Obstructive Lung Disease, Pleural Effusion, and Respiratory Failure. He graduated from Guru Nanak Dev University Medical College in 1984 and is affiliated with Morton Plant Hospital Clearwater.
providers.patient_quote: Dr. Varun Bhaskar is very professional, attentive and gives the impression to be trustworthy. He takes the time to listen and discuss health conditions in a clear manner.

providers.name: Dr. Amar G. Patel
providers.title: Chiropractor

education.chiropractic_school: Parker College of Chiropractic, Dallas, TX

adjustment_methods.name: Diversified
adjustment_methods.description: The most common type of chiropractic adjustment. Dr. Patel has been called a 'gentle' and 'pain free' adjustor by many patients.

adjustment_methods.name: Activator Method
adjustment_methods.description: A gentle method of adjusting that uses a specific instrument to ease nerve interference.

providers.treatment_approach: Dr. Patel takes a 'whole person' approach in chiropractic care, looking for the underlying causes of disease, discomfort, and pain, as opposed to just treating the symptoms.
providers.bio: Dr. Amar Patel has been a licensed Chiropractor since 2004 and has been freeing people from pain since 2007 in clinics in Palm Harbor and New Port Richey. He earned his Doctorate of Chiropractic from Parker College of Chiropractic in Dallas, TX and holds a B.S. in Biology from Montclair State University. Dr. Patel takes a 'whole person' approach, looking for the underlying causes of disease, discomfort, and pain.

providers.name: Dr. McGaha
providers.title: Family Medicine Physician
providers.bio: Dr. McGaha provides family medicine services at the Holiday, FL location.

providers.name: Christina Tomasino
